description: Standard repo-audit flow: scan current tree, scan git history, review dependencies, run a security review, write a report. Most of the audit is parallelisable so we fan-out across the four scanners and then chain into the report.
definitionOfDone: Every scanner returned a verdict, a single audit report is on disk for "${context}", and at least one reviewer signed off on the conclusions.

tasks.summary: Scan the current working tree of ${context} for risk surface
Scan git history of ${context} for leaked secrets and shape drift

lanes.name: audit-report
lanes.summary: Synthesize the ${context} audit findings into one report

lanes.name: audit-review
lanes.summary: Reviewer sign-off on the ${context} audit report
